intended_use: The DR 800 system is indicated for performing dynamic imaging examinations (fluoroscopy and/or rapid sequence) of the following anatomies/procedures: Positioning fluoroscopy procedures, Gastro-intesti
intended_use_full: The DR 800 system is indicated for performing dynamic imaging examinations (fluoroscopy and/or rapid sequence) of the following anatomies/procedures: Positioning fluoroscopy procedures, Gastro-intestinal examinations, Urogenital tract examinations, and Angiography. It is intended to replace fluoroscopic images obtained through image intensifier technology. In addition, the system is intended for project radiography of all body parts.
ground_truth: Comparison to reference images using anonymized phantoms; comparison to current FLFS software already on the market
other_metrics: Image quality validation results indicated pulsed and continuous fluoroscopy imaging was between good and excellent and passed acceptance criteria; MUSICA3 Abdomen+ images were suitable for diagnosis with overall higher image quality; clinical acceptability was proven for static images; dose control validation showed none of the detector doses exceeded DIN-norm or dose limit curve
